name: VisitScheduleBuilder.constructor
use_when: Open a builder bound to the entity the form is generating the schedule for. Pass exactly one of the four entity keys.

name: VisitScheduleBuilder.add
use_when: Add one scheduled visit to the builder. encounterType MUST match an existing Encounter Type name in the bundle. earliestDate and maxDate are JS Dates.

name: VisitScheduleBuilder.getAll
use_when: Return every visit currently held by the builder. Use as the rule's return value when no de-duplication is required.

name: VisitScheduleBuilder.getAllUnique
use_when: Return visits deduplicated by the given key (commonly 'encounterType'). Use when the rule may add the same encounter type more than once and only the first should survive.
